
  Done! I've implemented the JWT authentication middleware with the
  following changes:

  - Created src/auth/jwt.go with token generation and validation
  - Updated src/auth/handler.go to use JWT tokens
  - Added src/auth/middleware.go for route protection
  - Created tests in src/auth/jwt_test.go

  All tests pass. The implementation uses HS256 signing with
  configurable expiry times.

>
